title: IS Administrator or Senior IS Administrator - PeopleSoft
description:
Our client is actively searching for a IS Administrator or Senior IS Administrator - PeopleSoft to join their team!

If you are a dynamic individual seeking a new career opportunity, read further!

The responsibilities of this role are:

  • Spearhead the technical administration and operational support as well as continuous improvement of enterprise applications such as PeopleSoft Campus Solutions, Electronic Document Management System, and OutSystems.
  • Troubleshoot performance issues, apply patches/upgrades, and ensure high availability.
  • Ensure application security and performance through regular assessments and remediation using tools such as HP WebInspect, HP Fortify, Web Application Firewall and LoadRunner, in alignment with IT security standards.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver business-driven solutions through system implementation and enhancement initiatives.
  • Manage vendor engagements and oversee the lifecycle of outsourced IT projects, including requirements definition, procurement support, solution evaluation, and implementation oversight.
  • Lead and coordinate user testing and training activities to ensure high adoption and readiness for new system functionalities.
  • Maintain and continuously improve system documentation and knowledge base in line with project and organizational standards.
  • Gather user feedback and usage data post-deployment to identify opportunities for enhancements and optimize user experience.
  • Support the planning and delivery of systems with infrastructure and integration dependencies, ensuring minimal disruption and high performance.
  • Assess emerging tools and technologies to recommend innovative solutions that enhance productivity, security, or scalability.
  • Contribute to digital transformation initiatives and digital master plan alignment to better support institutional goals.
  • Other duties as assigned.

The ideal candidate will need to have the following qualities and experience:

  • Degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience with PeopleSoft Campus Solutions, including installation, administration, upgrades, and strong knowledge of its application and security architecture.
  • Security-related certifications such as CEH or equivalent are highly preferred.
  • Proficient in using application security tools (e.g. HP WebInspect, HP Fortify, Burp Suite) and performance testing tools (e.g. LoadRunner).
  • Experience with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure or AWS.
  • Familiarity with administration of enterprise platforms such as Documentum and OutSystems is advantageous.
  • Solid understanding of software development lifecycles and structured project methodologies (e.g., Agile, Waterfall).
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to troubleshoot complex issues.
  • Effective communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills for working with both technical teams and business users.

All applicants' CV will be treated with the strictest confidentiality. We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
CTES CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

Our Recruitment Consultants are equipped with extensive recruitment and industry expertise in their

areas of specialisation.

 

The experience combined with their commitment to establish a deep understanding of our client and

their business priorities enable CTES to deliver value far beyond the service provided by traditional

search firms.

 

We provide an impeccable match. At CTES, we believe in providing a seamless match between

candidate and client. We deem it our responsibility to thoroughly understand our client's needs, and to

obtain in-depth knowledge of the job requirements and the culture of the client's organization. This

enables us to provide suitable and proficient candidates to our clients.

 

By ensuring a close match between the candidate and position, we are able to foster a win-win

situation, for both our clients and our candidates.

 

CTES aims to be an organisation renowned throughout the Asia-Pacific region, integral to both

employers and career seekers. We hope to become the preferred HR and career consultants for our

clients and candidates respectively.
